we are still theorycrafting

kath is good to pull for, idk if you should pull on the anni banner for her though
she needs e3 so you need to pull a lot
and you can miss and get her wheel
which is fine for kath but idk if its worth that many pulls for you
if by "really like kath" you mean "are willing to sink potentially 600+ pulls to get e3 kath" then sure i guess
you can also pull e1 or e2 and use prototype horizons to make up the difference

Hello friends, I'm sort-of a new player, Keeper Level 30, Currently on Chapter 5 of the story, and yes I'll admit I did get this game because of the Saya collab and yes i will accept tomatoes being thrown at me 🍅

Now, I want to build a good team with Saya, I've searched and I've searched everywhere I could, about Awakeners that would be good with Saya.
Everyone says to use Corposant, Doresain, Mouchette, Xu, Vortice, Murphy, Salvador, Caecus, GDoll, etc.

Someone said Saya doesn't Synergize well with Helot:Catena and I'm just confused.
I'm really liking the game so far, with I found it sooner.

But these are all the characters I have, some people said they use Aigis with her and maybe even Thais, but there must be something I don't know.

I also got her Wheel of Destiny, "Alien Crypsela" +3, but I wouldn't know which secondary WoD to use with her, although a vast majority recommend to do a Sigil Yield build, I'll have to do my research on what Sigil Yield is, I'm sure I'll figure it out. I'd still need to know which WoDs to put on others, because for some reason I've been using "Wheel Unseen" (for +2 Hand Limit) and "Moment of Reunion" (for the +50 Keyflare each time a card is played) on random characters like Aigis pretty much freestyling the game, not knowing which things to do specifically but I also haven't put time into studying that part yet.

Sorry if I'm sounding like I need someone to hold my hand and guide me through this whole process, as I should have put more time into seeing how things work myself, but I feel like I don't want to make any more mistakes, I feel like I already have. Now, I'm fearing that I might've put my account in an unrecoverable state somehow LOL, can I redeem myself?

I've also been using "A Mouse's Wisdom" Posse, but maybe for Saya, I should be using others.

I believe that if there's a will, there's a way, so I don't think I'll worry about Meta teams as of right now at least.

I was going to ask if I should have at least one Chaos Awakener on my team for the 100% Death Resistance, on top of that, Saya's first talent says, "...If the team only consists of Caro or Chaos Awakeners, the damage amplification granted by this effect is doubled"

I tried using Uvhash, but some people also don't recommend to use him either, someone else recommended a Tentacle Awakener to use with her, but wouldn't that negate her first talent?

someone also said all Uvhash does is let leigh heal more cause you self damage

I've been using Saya, Uvhash, Leigh, and Thais on my Saya team, am I doing something wrong?

Please let me know what I should do, and shouldn't do! I've been trying to get Mouchette but some tell others they should wait mid June. Thanks for the help in advance Keepers.

Simply put, saya is good at a few things, 
1. She prints corrode like a motherfucker, so you can pretty much guarantee triple your damage as long as you don't mind shuffling your hand a bunch

2. Once in a blue moon, when the stars align and Aliemus rains down from the heavens to feed your saya, she'll activate her ult and give you a free set of any one awakener's cards. If you feed her a whopping *400* Aliemus and you have her OE, this gets even better by making them all happen twice instead of once

3. The caro realm effect change she comes with changes the way babies work quite a bit. Instead of the usual 10% crit rate, you now get a buff that makes your ults better in basically all measurably aspects, except resource generation (doesn't increase Aliemus or Arithmetica gain, same with card draw effects.), in return for this pretty massive buff, babies are now expensive as shit so you can't print a handful of children in a single turn to battery up all your units

If you're asking me on some obvious synergies, the one constant about this game is, that Thais is good at everything and this is really no exception. Thais exalt does damage, poison and counter and saya's new caro realm passive increases damage, poison and counter on exalt use. 

One other synergy is with all discard teams. Saya's corrode print has retain, and it discards your hand with a full redraw, so she works quite well with TuluSant or CorpoRita, or really any discard team that's to your liking 
the caro buff also buffs tentacle damage bonus generation which makes her really fun with tulu imo, but in the end I'm an Aurita stan (and not a Tulu haver...) so I'll end up running Saya with my CorpoRita team a lot. The ult is also quite useful there, because getting Tulu cards for cheap is pretty massive considering how *incredibly* expensive that man is.

Another potential team I've thought about but not tested is a Caro/Ultra counter team with Wanda, Saya, winkle (or Thais) and a subdps like Arachne or something. Not tested yet, I just really think Saya could be fun to use with Wanda, since her biggest issue is the frankly ridiculous skill card costs. 



And with this massively misleading mistake of a comment, I leave the stage to people who *actualy* know what they're talking about. Please don't be too mean to me

very insightful, I do want to use Tentacle (for the first time) with saya, but i'm worried about doing that because her first talent wouldn't help all the other Caro/Chaos Awakeners if i have a Tentale Awakener there. 
What team do you think I should go based on the Awakeners I have?
I mean I think you could try the weird counter comp I already talked about earlier
Wanda Saya Thais Arachne
(in general you should level your arachne she OP fr fr)
The problem you'll be facing is just how slow this will probably be
And the other problem you'll be facing is, that you won't have a lot of counter until your first buffed Thais ult
i never had experience with Wanda or Arcache, but i do have one of these 🤔
Don't use that for now
that's gonna take 50 years
I mean, it should be 1 devour. Thais gives a bunch of keyflare, which you can use to get her rouse and then you can let her eat her scion
should I use thais with normal WoD's or should i keep using "Wheel Unseen" (for +2 Hand Limit) and "Moment of Reunion" (for the +50 Keyflare each time a card is played) keyflare spam

Got it thanks for the help I think i will try to get e1 or just one copy of her and use prototypes for the rest

 i also plan on getting vortice i heard she's good and bad from a youtuber called flares
I would love to know your opinion on her

im still going for kaleido cuz maybe ill spend a lil when i get paid but for now i have to plan my f2p adventure.
